requirements: Deer Ridge is a trailhead for off-leash dogs.  Riders MUST give dogs/ owners the right of way.  Please give the dogs/ owners plenty of space at the trailhead and parking areas. Maple Hollow is now the overflow for Deer Ridge, since they are so close.
notes: New Trailhead (2026) very close to Upper Maple Trailhead with more parking available
